BTC.reasoning: Setup flat coerente per conflitto: SMA -12% (forza 0.81 bearish) domina su taker buy e momentum deboli. Fear&Greed a 12 pesa come contrarian ma non basta a generare direzione; mantiene bassa conviction senza veto.

ETH.reasoning: Flat è coerente: trend dominante (dist_sma -15%, rel_strength BTC -1.85) prevale su segnali deboli. FG=12 (Extreme Fear) è contrarian bullish ma forza 0.4 insufficiente a ribaltare; taker buy marginale. Nessuna contraddizione grave per neutralità con conviction già a 1.

VELVET.reasoning: Strong conflict: parabolic momentum and BTC outperformance clash with RSI 99.1 reversal risk. Extreme Fear (FG=12) adds weak contrarian tailwind (weight 0.4) but is dominated by mean-reversion signal. Flat decision holds yet remains fragile.

BEAT.reasoning: Setup fragile: RSI 89.2 + 400% 7d run-up signal strong mean-reversion risk despite price above SMA and BTC outperformance. Extreme Fear (12) adds contrarian support but is outweighed by overbought conditions; Fear & Greed weighted lightly positive. Low rule conviction already reflects this tension.

STG.reasoning: Setup fragile: +169% 7d rally with RSI 80.3 and price +172% above SMA creates strong mean-reversion risk that clashes with trend drivers. Extreme Fear (12) adds contrarian support but is outweighed by overbought metrics; conviction lowered accordingly.

ALLO.reasoning: Setup shows conflict: strong momentum (price +104% above SMA, +116% 7d outperformance) clashes with contrarian extreme fear (FNG=12). Fear & Greed is weighted as the main bullish driver but its low strength (0.4) and massive prior run-up make the long fragile, justifying -1 adjustment. No outright veto.

SKYAI.reasoning: Momentum e relative strength molto forti (+45/58% e +59% vs BTC) con prezzo sopra SMA supportano long. Extreme Fear (F&G=12) agisce da contrarian positivo senza contraddire il trend. Taker sell aggressivo è presente ma debole (0.22) e non crea fragilità sufficiente per veto o riduzione conviction.
